'''Tun Dameerd''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].

==Biography==
They were one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Dameerd was supportive of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and wary of [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
